# Katherine Rea

> Fractional AI Product Marketing Leader — San Luis Obispo, CA

Katherine Rea is a senior product marketing leader with 10+ years of experience driving subscriber growth and go-to-market strategy across global subscription and marketplace businesses.

She is available for fractional engagements and specializes in:
- AI product positioning and launch strategy
- Subscription GTM and lifecycle marketing
- Competitive intelligence and market research
- Creator and influencer growth programs
- Cross-functional GTM leadership

## Current & Recent Work

- **Adobe** (2026–present): Senior PMM for the global student business — owns value proposition, messaging, and GTM strategy for Creative Cloud across a 250M+ learner market. Built AI-focused competitive landscape tracker covering 15 competitors.
- **DIRECTV** (2022–2026): Senior PMM for premium video subscription products. Achieved 120% of gross subscriber targets in 2024, 145% in 2025. Led brand-led campaigns featuring Travis Kelce and Kumail Nanjiani.
- **KiwiCo** (2017–2022): Grew influencer ecosystem to 7M+ global reach, CPA 50% below target, tripled monthly campaign volume.
- **Minted** (2014–2017): Co-developed and launched Minted More, the company's first subscription program.
- **Hulu** (2012–2014): Contributed to launch of Hulu Plus, growing to 25M+ members.

## AI Projects Built

- **Keto Meal Planner**: Full-stack meal planning app built in Claude Code — drag-and-drop meal and snack cards, real-time macro tracking, daily feedback. Live at https://awesome-keto-planner.netlify.app/
- **AI Creative Market Landscape**: Standalone competitive intelligence tracker monitoring 15 AI creative tool competitors across pricing, messaging, customer sentiment, and AI credit systems.
- **PMM Resources Hub**: Reorganized internal wiki using AI into a job-to-be-done framework — five lanes replacing hundreds of scattered docs.

## Education

BA, Economics, cum laude — University of Pennsylvania
